pullRequest.title: DOM-54624 Dom 54624 flows landing page basic layout

nodes.body: Do we actually need this component?
It is the section entry point, it is probable that we won't be adding more content right now but I would like to have a view and not the router as entry point
There is no value in the theme helper for this gap
Will you add it in a future PR?
Yes, it is not defined yet, I will come in the next PRs.
We can use "import React from 'react';" for all related files.
afaik there is no theme helper entry for the font family, please let me know if you have found one.

Isn't roboto the default font-family?
We should globally control the font-family. In visual refresh, we are going to change it to inter. cc: @ddl-g-chen
